title: EVA Racing
wikitext:
[]: EVA Racing             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Mon Mar 26, 2018 11:51 pm After finding an article this evening, thought I would share this with the rest of you. So, apparently there is an EVA Racing team that this has existed since 2012. I saw an article from Kotaku pointed it out to me. It's actually kinda cool after I clicked through to their twitter and then their site and started reading the (horrible and choppy) Google translations. It's actually kind of cool that they have an entire racing team with cars (and motorcycles too) painted up like Unit-01 and Unit-02, I mean, they're not winning races, but it would still be cool to see them race around. If Shinji doesn't get in, I will.  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: EVA Racing             Quote Post by Joseki » Tue Mar 27, 2018 8:35 am The car team races in the Suzuka 10h and Fuji 24h, and those are actually high profile races for the GT class. It's no small feat, even if they aren't a top team.

[]: Re: EVA Racing             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Tue Mar 27, 2018 10:13 pm There's an Eva Racing book, too! It mainly focuses on photos of the race queens from the 2012 team, but there are also a few pics of the cars and motorcycles, plus Unit-01 and Unit-02. Oh, and the book comes with a DVD as well. I reviewed the book here: http://literaryeagle.tumblr.com/post/115384215994/for-my-twenty-third-evangelion-book-review-here

[]: Re: EVA Racing             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sun Apr 01, 2018 2:38 am Literary Eagle wrote: There's an Eva Racing book, too! It mainly focuses on photos of the race queens from the 2012 team, but there are also a few pics of the cars and motorcycles, plus Unit-01 and Unit-02. Oh, and the book comes with a DVD as well. I reviewed the book here: http://literaryeagle.tumblr.com/post/115384215994/for-my-twenty-third-evangelion-book-review-here

Article: EVA Racing
[]: EVA Racing             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Mon Mar 26, 2018 11:51 pm After finding an article this evening, thought I would share this with the rest of you. So, apparently there is an EVA Racing team that this has existed since 2012. I saw an article from Kotaku pointed it out to me. It's actually kinda cool after I clicked through to their twitter and then their site and started reading the (horrible and choppy) Google translations. It's actually kind of cool that they have an entire racing team with cars (and motorcycles too) painted up like Unit-01 and Unit-02, I mean, they're not winning races, but it would still be cool to see them race around. If Shinji doesn't get in, I will.  SPOILER: Show

It mainly focuses on photos of the race queens from the 2012 team, but there are also a few pics of the cars and motorcycles, plus Unit-01 and Unit-02. Oh, and the book comes with a DVD as well.
